seoTitle: Tonghi Creek vs Tongio — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tonghi Creek and Tongio. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tonghi Creek vs Tongio: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tonghi Creek and Tongio.
heading: Tonghi Creek vs Tongio — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tonghi Creek, Victoria and Tongio, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tonghi Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Tongio (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tonghi Creek or Tongio safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tonghi Creek has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Tongio scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tonghi Creek scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Tongio scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tonghi Creek or Tongio?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tonghi Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
